name: Chesapeake, VA

rent.notes: Chesapeake 2BR house rental slightly below Norfolk/Virginia Beach average

groceries.notes: 2 adults + pet food. Food Lion, Kroger, Harris Teeter, Walmart available.

healthcare.notes: Medicare Part B + Medigap Plan G + Part D + dental/vision. Chesapeake Regional Medical Center nearby.

insurance.notes: Flood insurance may be needed in low-lying areas — adds $50-150/mo if required

petCare.notes: Vet visits, vaccinations, flea/tick, pet insurance. Multiple vet clinics in Chesapeake.

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week, large breed rate. Camp Bow Wow Chesapeake, Dogtopia nearby.

petGrooming.notes: Bernese coat maintenance, professional grooming monthly. Hampton Roads grooming prices near national average.

transportation.notes: Car-dependent. HRT bus service limited in Chesapeake. Gas, insurance, maintenance costs.

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

miscellaneous.notes: Vehicle personal property tax, miscellaneous fees, household supplies

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Chesapeake City, VA). Hampton Roads — Sentara dominant, Optima Health available. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Age 65+ deduction $12K/person. SS fully exempt from VA tax.

salesTax.notes: Chesapeake 6% (4.3% state + 1% local + 0.7% Hampton Roads regional transit)

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Vehicle personal property tax $4.08/$100 assessed value in Chesapeake.

taxes.notes: Chesapeake sales tax 6%. Vehicle personal property tax $4.08/$100 assessed value.

healthcare.notes: Chesapeake Regional Medical Center (310 beds, Level III trauma). Sentara hospitals in Norfolk/Virginia Beach within 20 minutes. Naval Medical Center Portsmouth nearby for eligible veterans.

acaMarketplace.notes: Hampton Roads — Sentara dominant, Optima Health available.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Great Dismal Swamp NWR, Chesapeake City Park (city's largest), Northwest River Park (763 acres). Dog-friendly parks and trails. Military community presence.

pros: Lower cost of living than Norfolk/Virginia Beach
Suburban with good parks and trails
Great Dismal Swamp National Wildlife Refuge nearby
Lower crime rate than neighboring cities
SS fully exempt from VA state income tax
Proximity to Virginia Beach oceanfront (30 min)
Strong military community and VA healthcare access
cons: Flood risk in low-lying areas — may require flood insurance
Humid summers with high heat index
